papers.title: Gene replacement outcomes in Duchenne muscular dystrophy
Natural history and progression biomarkers in Duchenne muscular dystrophy

scores.rationale: DMD has severe morbidity, mortality, and limited durable treatment options.
scores.citations_json: [{"doi":"10.1000/dmd.2026.002","pmid":"40000002","pmcid":"PMC1200002","chunk_index":2,"chunk_text":"**Disease progression is marked by early loss of ambulation and progressive cardiopulmonary decline despite standard care.**","chunk_text_raw":"Disease progression is marked by early loss of ambulation and progressive cardiopulmonary decline despite standard care.","highlight_start_word":0,"highlight_end_word":14}]

scores.rationale: Vector delivery and trial endpoints are established, but durability and immune responses remain risks.
scores.citations_json: [{"doi":"10.1000/dmd.2026.001","pmid":"40000001","pmcid":"PMC1200001","chunk_index":4,"chunk_text":"**Systemic vector delivery produced functional microdystrophin expression with variable durability across cohorts.**","chunk_text_raw":"Systemic vector delivery produced functional microdystrophin expression with variable durability across cohorts.","highlight_start_word":0,"highlight_end_word":11},{"doi":"10.1000/dmd.2026.001","pmid":"40000001","pmcid":"PMC1200001","chunk_index":7,"chunk_text":"**Transient transaminitis and pre-existing anti-capsid immunity were key exclusion or management considerations.**","chunk_text_raw":"Transient transaminitis and pre-existing anti-capsid immunity were key exclusion or management considerations.","highlight_start_word":0,"highlight_end_word":11}]

scores.rationale: Population size and high development/manufacturing costs create a moderate viability profile.
scores.citations_json: [{"doi":"10.1000/dmd.2026.002","pmid":"40000002","pmcid":"PMC1200002","chunk_index":9,"chunk_text":"**Eligible prevalence remains limited, requiring efficient trial design and manufacturing scale controls.**","chunk_text_raw":"Eligible prevalence remains limited, requiring efficient trial design and manufacturing scale controls.","highlight_start_word":0,"highlight_end_word":10}]
